plan_summary.plan_name: Hauts-de-France 9 GW Sovereign AI Data Center - Pragmatic Scale-Up
plan_summary.primary_goal: Build Phase 1 (500 MW-1 GW) in 36 months at PUE <=1.20 and secure binding RTE + 60% tenant commitment before Phase 2 FID.
plan_summary.modelling_frame: Tests Phase 1 CAPEX budget surplus, tenant take-or-pay margin vs the 60% gate, buildable-area capacity coverage, and land-holding cost buffer against the €1.3B overrun risk.

key_values.label: Phase 1 CAPEX ceiling
key_values.comment: Upper Phase 1 CAPEX envelope for 500 MW-1 GW; ceiling against which holding and remediation overruns are tested.
key_values.source_text: Phase 1 budget maximum (500 MW-1 GW): EUR 10B

key_values.label: Phase 2 take-or-pay tenant gate
key_values.comment: Minimum signed take-or-pay share of the next 2 GW tranche required to release Phase 2 FID.
key_values.source_text: Phase 2 expansion FID requires minimum 60% take-or-pay commitment threshold.

key_values.label: Total contiguous footprint
key_values.comment: Full contiguous land assembly target; denominator for buildable vs buffer split.
key_values.source_text: Total contiguous land assembly target: 161 km²

key_values.label: Mandatory buffer share of footprint
key_values.comment: Hyper-dense model designates 80% of footprint as non-buildable buffer; drives holding cost and buildable area.
key_values.source_text: 80% of the 161 km² footprint must be designated as ecological buffer.

key_values.label: Phase 1 power target (upper)
key_values.comment: Upper Phase 1 power target (500 MW-1 GW); drives revenue and PUE energy cost exposure.
key_values.source_text: Phase 1 power target range maximum: 1 GW

key_values.label: Annual buffer land holding cost per hectare
key_values.comment: Midpoint of EUR 50k-75k/ha/year cited by Review Issue 2; applied to 128.8 km² for 18-month holding.
key_values.source_text: Explicitly budget holding cost for 128.8 km² (EUR 50k-75k/ha annually).

key_values.label: Land holding cost overrun envelope
key_values.comment: Stated CAPEX overrun risk if 80% buffer holding cost remains unbudgeted within Phase 1 envelope.
key_values.source_text: Budget overrun (EUR 1.3B+) due to uncosted holding costs for buffer land.

key_values.label: Phase 1 land holding duration
key_values.comment: Plan ring-fences 18 months of buffer holding cost upfront; period over which holding cost accrues.
key_values.source_text: Explicitly budget holding costs for the 128.8 km² buffer for 18 months upfront.

derived_questions.question: Does the Phase 1 CAPEX ceiling absorb both the stated holding-cost overrun envelope and the expected buffer holding cost?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Phase 1 viability fails if uncosted holding costs plus the cited overrun envelope eat the CAPEX ceiling.

derived_questions.question: Do expected signed take-or-pay commitments clear the 60% Phase 2 gate?
derived_questions.why_it_matters: Phase 2 FID is blocked unless signed tenant share exceeds the 60% threshold; primary financial gate.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Annual tenant revenue per MW
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Required to monetize Phase 1 capacity and benchmark the 60% take-or-pay tenant commitment in EUR terms.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark against European hyperscale colocation lease rates per MW-year for AI-grade tenants.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Expected Phase 2 signed take-or-pay share
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Tested against the 60% gate to determine whether Phase 2 FID can proceed.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Use LOI-to-signed conversion velocity on the 2 GW tranche from comparable European hyperscale pipelines.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Buildable area actually used for compute in Phase 1
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Combines with buildable land to express Phase 1 buildable capacity actually consumed by the 1 GW deployment.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Benchmark km² per GW for liquid-cooled hyperscale campuses; bound 0.05-0.30.

missing_values_to_estimate.label: Brownfield remediation cost overrun
missing_values_to_estimate.why_needed: Pressure on the same Phase 1 CAPEX envelope as the holding-cost overrun; needed for combined viability test.
missing_values_to_estimate.suggested_estimation_method: Bound between EUR 0 and the cited EUR 1.5B doubling/tripling delta on the EUR 750M baseline.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Buildable area after buffer designation
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Sets the capacity ceiling that any Phase 1 buildable utilization must fit inside.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 buffer land holding cost
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Translates the unbudgeted 80% buffer into a EUR figure that pressures the Phase 1 CAPEX envelope.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 annual revenue at full deployment
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Bottom-up Phase 1 revenue used to size the EUR value of the 60% take-or-pay tenant commitment.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 buildable capacity surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Confirms Phase 1 fits inside the 32.2 km² buildable envelope, with positive surplus for expansion.

recommended_first_calculations.label: Phase 1 CAPEX combined pressure surplus
recommended_first_calculations.why_first: Tests whether the same Phase 1 CAPEX envelope can absorb holding cost, the cited overrun reserve, and brownfield remediation overrun together.

unmodelled_gates.label: Binding RTE transmission allocation
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Phase 1 construction financing cannot close unless RTE issues a binding transmission allocation for the Phase 2 3 GW expansion.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 1 FID is blocked and EUR 1B-2B Phase 0/1 capital risks being stranded if tenants withdraw.

unmodelled_gates.label: DGSI/ANSSI sovereign partition sign-off
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Access to premium domestic sovereign revenue depends on a formal signed DGSI/ANSSI agreement before scaling load.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Loss of EUR 10B-20B in long-term premium contracted revenue and jeopardised 60% Phase 2 tenant commitment.

unmodelled_gates.label: 161 km² land assembly legal decree
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Judicial challenge to the hyper-dense 80% buffer model could halt construction and shrink buildable area below 15 km².
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Phase 1 FID slips 12-24 months and the 9 GW long-term capacity ceiling is permanently reduced.

unmodelled_gates.label: Credible social license before Phase 1
unmodelled_gates.why_it_matters: Project cannot proceed past Phase 0 without a credible social license covering workforce uplift and buffer land use.
unmodelled_gates.consequence_if_false: Permitting stalls and the Prefecture may force a mandated footprint reduction independent of financial thresholds.
